Bauxite.description: Sedimentary bauxite with a high aluminium content.

Aluminium.description: A lightweight and easily milled ingot of aluminium.
Aluminium.flavorText: \'I don\'t have aluminium foil on my windows any more.\' - Rick James

Aluminium_Arrow.description: A mid-grade, lightweight arrow giving decent range and damage.

Metal_Ladder.description: A sturdy metal ladder for climbing.

Iron_Floor.description: Lightweight but resilient sheet aluminium flooring.
Iron_Floor.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Wall.flavorText: Cycle for other construction variants. Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Iron_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Iron_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Iron_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Ramp.description: A lightweight sheet aluminium ramp or roofing sheet.
Iron_Ramp.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Iron_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Iron_Door.description: A rough but resilient corrugated aluminium door.
Iron_Door.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_TrapDoor.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Iron_Window.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Anvil_Bench.description: Heavyweight work surface for iron and steel tools, using ingots smelted in their appropriate furnaces.
Anvil_Bench.flavorText: Arguably the simplest fabrication system known to humanity.

Iron_Roof_Corner.description: A strong, lightweight insert for angled roofs.

Polarbear_Pelt.description: A fur hide from the largest known carnivore on two planets.
Polarbear_Pelt.flavorText: An unparalleled hunter, able to smell its prey from over a mile away, the polar bear has only one natural enemy: you.

Polarbear_Head_Armor.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Chest_Armor.description: Strong, lightweight body armor with extreme protection against cold.
Polarbear_Chest_Armor.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Feet_Armor.description: Highly insulated, lightweight protective fur boots.
Polarbear_Feet_Armor.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Leg_Armor.description: Lightweight fur armor for the lower body, offering exceptional insulation.
Polarbear_Leg_Armor.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Arm_Armor.description: Tough and lightweight fur gloves offering extreme protection against low temperatures.
Polarbear_Arm_Armor.flavorText: Skinning polar bears has been illegal to everyone except Inuit hunters for centuries on Earth. On Icarus, there is no such prohibition.

Antibiotic_Paste.description: Reduces the duration of food poisoning, and other low grade infections.
Antibiotic_Paste.flavorText: A natural antibacterial agent that diminishes the impact of afflictions such as infected wounds and cave sickness.

Antiparasitic_Paste.description: A medical preparation for reducing the duration of festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Antiparasitic_Paste.flavorText: From the very first, newcomers to Icarus noted the medicinal and bioactive properties of Earth-type plants were significantly more intense.

Antipoison_Paste.description: A basic toxicology and anti-venom kit to reduce the duration of poisoning.
Antipoison_Paste.flavorText: It\'s speculated that exotics may suffuse much of the plant life in the terrazone, imparting bioactive properties, though exactly what these are, whether they\'re safe, and exactly how it works ... at this stage, who knows?

Antibiotic_Tonic.description: An antibacterial distillation that cures food poisoning, wound infections and afflictions like cave sickness.
Antibiotic_Tonic.flavorText: The interaction between bioactive substances and microbial life here on Icarus is still poorly understood, especially when one factors in the effects of exotic matter to both.

Antiparasitic_Tonic.description: A medicinal preparation for curing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Antiparasitic_Tonic.flavorText: From suppurating wounds to dysentery, this natural broad-spectrum antibiotic remedy cures it all.

Antipoison_Tonic.flavorText: Of the many ways to die on Icarus, poisoning is perhaps the least glorious.

Antibiotic_Pill.description: A broad-spectrum antibacterial agent, protecting against food poisoning, wound infections and cave sickness.
Antibiotic_Pill.flavorText: While not quite invincible, your susceptibility to microbial takeover will temporarily reach an all-time low.

Anitparasitic_Pill.description: A potent antibacterial preparation for preventing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Anitparasitic_Pill.flavorText: Flooding your body with antibiotics is a double-edged sword, but if it stops you needing to use the word \'festering\' to describe part of your body, it\'s worth it.

Antipoison_Pill.description: An long-acting anti-venom to prevent poisoning.

Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.description: Electro-active device that \'hijacks\' metallic envirosuit fibers to create a \'virtual exoskeleton\' that enhances carry capacity.
Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.flavorText: Electro-active shape-memory fibers are highly flexible under normal conditions, but become rigid when exposed to an electric charge.

Animal_Fat.description: The next best thing to butter.
Animal_Fat.flavorText: A key ingredient in energy dense cooking, life on any world would be almost unliveable without some kind of lipid.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporarily protects againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.description: An experimental device for projecting densely clustered micro-shockwaves in a gas medium.
Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.flavorText: A product of collaborative research between Group 15 and one of Larkwell Martinez\'s non-lethal weapons research units.

Basic_Quiver.description: Dedicated arrow storage, allowing faster reloading, swifter aiming and higher arrow speeds.

Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.description: A fast way to view the health of your prey, or your enemies
Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.flavorText: Remember to keep an eye on your own health bar too

Meta_Module_Animal_Highlighting.description: A quicker way to track your prey

Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.description: A scanner that can be programmed to locate specific deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.flavorText: The best that money can buy.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Abyssal_Oxite.description: A unstable form of Oxite found deep underground
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Abyssal_Oxite.flavorText: You feel a weird burning sensation..

Alteration_Bench.description: A bench with built-in drill press for crafting attachments and a workspace for altering Items.

Advanced_Alteration_Bench.description: A bench with a 3d printer to create any attachment. Allows faster altering of items than the basic Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your melee damage.
Tool_Attachment_Melee_Damage_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_1.description: An attachment that increases your attack speed.
Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your attack speed.
Tool_Attachment_Attack_Speed_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your chance of gathering leather from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Leather_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of plants from reaping.
Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Hammer_Attachment_Repair_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your speed of repairs.
Hammer_Attachment_Repair_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid repair hammer at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly helps prevent cave sickness and greatly improves health regeneration while in caves.
Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Storm_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves stamina regeneration in storms and exposure resistance.
Helmet_Attachment_Storm_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Poison_Water_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the chance of poison and water usage.
Helmet_Attachment_Poison_Water_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the stamina used for tool actions and the durability loss of tools.
Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.description: An attachment that improves swimming and climbing speed, and reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves swimming and climbing speed, and greatly reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Hands_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Hands_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the threat while stealth and greatly improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.description: An attachment that greatly increases carrying capacity and inventory slots.
Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, hands or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves health regeneration and physical resistance.
Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your aiming speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_ADS_Upgrade_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, rifle, shotgun, bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.description: An attachment that greatly increases the speed of projectiles.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the speed of projectiles and uses less stamina.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases your damage while stealthed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_2.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming, and the amount you can carry.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Lightweight_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_2.description: An attachment that increases the durability of your weapon.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Economic_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases both projectile and critical damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_2.description: An attachment that increases your movement speed while aiming and your reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Speed_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_2.description: An attachment that allows you an even closer view of your target, and greatly increases damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_2.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Advanced_Armor_Bench.description: Craft and assemble advanced protective items and garments.
Advanced_Armor_Bench.flavorText: With the ability to weave platinum into fiber and cure leather on a drying rack prospectors can craft tougher outfits for the harsh environment of Icarus.

Animal_Bed.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot

Advanced_Fishing_Trap.description: An advanced trap that can catch all types of fish.

Aquarium.description: A handy fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, powered by biofuel.

Advanced_Aquarium.description: A very fancy fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.
Advanced_Aquarium.flavorText: I repeat, do NOT tap on the glass.

Fish_10_Var2.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_10_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Advanced_Iron_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of iron, to attract more fish.
Advanced_Iron_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Avocado.description: A fruit with a creamy texture and nutty flavor, high in healthy fats.
Avocado.flavorText: These are commonly used in Mexican cuisine.

Spawn_Blocker_T3.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its large radius. Requires Biofuel.
Spawn_Blocker_T3.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Ammo_Casing.description: A rough iron ammo casing that can be used to create all types of ammo.
Ammo_Casing.flavorText: Basic building blocks for firearm ammunition.

Meta_Avocado_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Avocado Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Acidic_Glands.description: A diseased specimen that can be cleaned to gain animal fat.  Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.

Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.description: Currently the best option for a farmer on Icarus. It uses a mix of nutrient dense mist and rich soil to promote growth and yield.
Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Masonry_Bench_T3.description: A manual workspace for detailed stonework and crafting.
Masonry_Bench_T3.flavorText: The skill and precision of a mason can never be replaced by machines...

Aluminium_Ore_Stack_100.description: Sedimentary bauxite with a high aluminium content.

Desert_Striker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Arid Striker.
Desert_Striker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Ashen_Drake_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ashen Drake.
Ashen_Drake_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Arctic_Scorpion_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Arctic Scorpion.
Arctic_Scorpion_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Striker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ashen_Drake_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Arctic_Scorpion_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Antelope.
Desert_Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Gold_Bed.description: A gilded bed that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Bed.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Bookshelf.description: A gilded bookshelf that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Bookshelf.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Candle.description: A gilded candlestick that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Candle.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Standing_Lamp.description: A gilded lamp that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Standing_Lamp.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Dining_Chair.description: A gilded chair that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Dining_Chair.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Table_6Seater.description: A gilded table that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Table_6Seater.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Table_10Seater.description: A gilded table that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Table_10Seater.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Table_Round.description: A gilded table that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Table_Round.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Dresser.description: A gilded dresser that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Dresser.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Living_Chair.description: A gilded chair that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Living_Chair.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Living_Chair2.description: A gilded couch that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Living_Chair2.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Living_Chair3.description: A gilded couch that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Living_Chair3.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Nightstand.description: A gilded nightstand that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Nightstand.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Sitting_Bench.description: A gilded bench that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Sitting_Bench.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Shelf_Wall.description: A gilded shelf that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Shelf_Wall.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Wardrobe.description: A gilded wardrobe that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Wardrobe.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Vault.description: A gilded vault that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Vault.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Safe.description: A gilded safe that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Safe.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Fireplace.description: A gilded fireplace that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Fireplace.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Fireplace_Ext.description: A gilded fireplace extension that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Fireplace_Ext.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Fireplace_Cap.description: A gilded fireplace cap that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Fireplace_Cap.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Chandelier.description: A gilded chandelier that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Chandelier.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Wall_Light.description: A gilded light that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Wall_Light.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Wall_Sign.description: A gilded sign that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Wall_Sign.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Partition.description: A gilded partition that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Partition.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Rug.description: A gilded rug that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Rug.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Gold_Vase.description: A gilded vase that embodies the sleek, decorative essence of traditional Art Deco design.
Gold_Vase.flavorText: Art Deco is a decorative art and architectural style characterized by bold geometric patterns, and sleek lines which emerged in the 1920s and 30s on Earth.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_3.description: An audio log left behind by someone.
Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_3.flavorText: Could this hold the information you\'ve been searching for?

Battery_Shelf_T4.description: A rack of high-capacity batteries that can supply power to your network.

Turret_Pistol.description: A turret that uses pistol ammunition to defend its surroundings. Fires a steady shots at a medium range. Power consumption reduced when idle.
Turret_Pistol.flavorText: This design is marked as "experimental" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.

Saddle_Armored.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount that is remnant of medieval knights.
Saddle_Armored.flavorText: Feel like a knight riding into battle.

Saddle_Explorer.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount that is designed for Arctic environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Pumpkin.description: A feed that will help animals survive arctic environments.

Mission_Aerosol_Emitter.description: A device for emitting an aerosol solution.

Pistol_T4.description: A pistol that utilizes the best planetside tech available.

Mission_Alternator.description: A makeshift alternator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.

Arctic_Bat_Head.description: What remains of a mutated bat-like creature.
Arctic_Bat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Arctic_Bat_Trophy.description: A Trophy of a mutated bat like creature.
Arctic_Bat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Saddle_Basic_Arctic.description: Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable
Saddle_Basic_Arctic.flavorText: Feel the wind in your hair.

Rifle_Assault_T4.description: An automatic firearm that fires mid caliber rounds. Works with Rifle Attachments and Talents.

LegendaryWeapon_Sniper.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Sniper created via studying of the Garganutan.
LegendaryWeapon_Sniper.flavorText: What the UDA should have Armed Prospectors with.

ArcticArmor_Head.description: Robust Armor Designed to Withstand the Depths of Arctic Zones.
